title: cymbopogon ambiguus
intro: Cymbopogon ambiguus, also known as the Lemon Myrtle, is a species of grass native to Australia, known for its distinctive citrus scent and fragrant leaves. The medicinal properties of the plant include its antimicrobial, antifungal, and antiseptic properties, which make it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Cymbopogon ambiguus include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and providing relief from anxiety and stress, as well as its potential to aid in weight management. The herbal preparations of the plant include tea, essential oil, and capsules, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and enjoy its various health benefits.
